        {\textbf{GenAI Franchise Personality Quiz}}{}
        \resumeItemListStart
            \resumeItem{Built an end-to-end quiz generator: users describe any fictional class system in natural language; Gemini parses the franchise, scrapes Fandom wikis for canon characters, and roleplays each through 15 Likert questions to produce reference vectors asynchronously via FastAPI background jobs.}
            \resumeItem{Implemented a vector-based classifier that scores user answers with cosine similarity against LLM-generated character embeddings, ranks classes by per-type mean similarity, and projects results into 3D PCA for interactive visualization in a Next.js results UI.}
            \resumeItem{Deployed a split architecture on Vercel (frontend) and Google Cloud Run (API), with durable quiz artifacts in GCS, shareable quiz URLs, a community quiz library, and GitHub Actions CI (pre-commit, pytest, automated API deploy).}

        \resumeItemListStart

            \resumeItem{Applied \textbf{K-nearest neighbors}-derived baselines to support \textbf{LightGBM} inference on sparse, non-metered blocks where direct sensor history was unavailable.}
            \resumeItem{Built automated model \textbf{CI/CD} on \textbf{GCP}: scheduled \textbf{GitHub Actions} retraining with \textbf{MLflow} experiment tracking and a \textbf{champion/challenger} promotion gate (validation MAE) before GCS upload; split deploy across \textbf{Vercel} (frontend) and \textbf{Cloud Run} (API).}
